mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_LH_MOULD_CHANGE_PLAN ( FACTORY_CODE, LH_RESULT_BATCH_NO, ORDER_NO, PLAN_DATE, PLAN_ORDER, CLASS_INDEX, SCHEDULE_DATE, LEFT_RIGHT_MOULD, LH_MACHINE_CODE, LH_MACHINE_NAME, BEFORE_MATERIAL_CODE, BEFORE_MATERIAL_DESC, CHANGE_MOULD_TYPE, AFTER_MATERIAL_CODE, AFTER_MATERIAL_DESC, CHANGE_TIME, MOULD_CODE, IS_RELEASE, MOULD_STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, REMARK, IS_DELETE ) VALUES
( #{item.factoryCode}, #{item.lhResultBatchNo}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.planDate}, #{item.planOrder}, #{item.classIndex}, #{item.scheduleDate}, #{item.leftRightMould}, #{item.lhMachineCode}, #{item.lhMachineName}, #{item.beforeMaterialCode}, #{item.beforeMaterialDesc}, #{item.changeMouldType}, #{item.afterMaterialCode}, #{item.afterMaterialDesc}, #{item.changeTime}, #{item.mouldCode}, #{item.isRelease}, #{item.mouldStatus}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.isDelete} )
